task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the JFrog Artifactory interface at localhost:8082, with the user logged in (typically indicated by the user profile icon or 'admin' in the top right).

task_completion.description: Create a new Maven Local Repository named 'libs-commons-local'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration -> Repositories -> Local list showing a repository named 'libs-commons-local' with the Package Type set to Maven (Maven logo).

task_completion.description: Initiate the move of the 'org' folder from 'temp-uploads'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifacts tree view showing the 'org' folder selected inside 'temp-uploads', with the 'Move' dialog open and 'libs-commons-local' selected as the target.

task_completion.description: Verify the artifact was successfully moved to the new Maven repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifacts tree view showing 'libs-commons-local' expanded, containing the 'org' folder hierarchy down to the 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' file.
The Artifacts tree view or Administration Repositories list showing that the 'temp-uploads' repository has been deleted and is no longer visible.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Artifactory
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) with the address bar pointing to localhost:8082.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing 'curl' commands or API scripts interacting with the Artifactory REST API to create repos or move artifacts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Artifactory UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the authentic JFrog Artifactory web interface with its standard menus, dialogs, and tree views, rather than a text editor or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source repository to delete: 'temp-uploads'. Target repository to create: 'libs-commons-local' (Type: Maven). Artifact path that must be moved: 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. Admin credentials: admin / password.
